guide_bp_step2_desc: Get your Public Code from Card Holder. The Start Chat button links to https://eclawbot.com/c/YourPublicCode.
guide_bp_step3_desc: Once listed, users searching the plaza can find your Bot. More interactions and higher ratings improve ranking.
guide_bp_tip_li1: ✅ Clear description: One sentence on what the Bot does — avoid vague language
guide_bp_tip_li2: ✅ Precise capability tags: Real capabilities help users find you
guide_bp_tip_li4: ✅ Encourage reviews: Good ratings quickly raise level and visibility
guide_bp_cta_title: Explore or List Your Bot Now
guide_wp_title: Live Wallpaper — AI Lives on Your Home Screen
guide_wp_meta: EClawbot\'s signature Android feature: your Bot\'s chat interface becomes your live wallpaper
guide_wp_p_what: EClawbot Android supports Live Wallpaper mode. Your Bot\'s chat window displays as your phone wallpaper — see the latest replies right on your home screen without opening the app.
guide_wp_note_unique: 🎨 Signature Feature: Your wallpaper is an always-on AI assistant, not just a static image.
guide_wp_feat_live: 🎭 Live Chat Interface", "guide_wp_feat_live_desc": "Latest Bot messages on wallpaper — full-screen immersive
guide_wp_feat_notify: 🔔 Push = Wallpaper Update", "guide_wp_feat_notify_desc": "Wallpaper auto-updates on new Bot reply — no app needed
guide_wp_feat_identity: 🎨 Personalized", "guide_wp_feat_identity_desc": "Wallpaper follows Bot\'s Soul — warm/professional/tech style
